GameID.description: The unique ID of the game tied to the StartingLineups

Season.description: The MLB season of the game

SeasonType.description: The type of season that this record corresponds to (1=Regular Season; 2=Preseason; 3=Postseason; 4=Offseason; 5=AllStar)

DateTime.description: The date and time of the game in US Eastern Time

Status.description: Indicates the game's status. Possible values include: Scheduled; InProgress; Final; Suspended; Delayed; Postponed; Canceled; Forfeit; NotNecessary.

HomeTeamID.description: The unique ID of the home team tied to these StartingLineups

HomeTeam.description: The abbreviation [Key] of the Home Team

AwayTeamID.description: The unique TeamID of the away team

AwayTeam.description: The abbreviation [Key] of the away team

HomeStartingPitcher.description: Home team starting pitcher. Note: this is a probable pitcher until confirmed field = TRUE.

HomeBattingLineup.description: The batting lineup of the home team

AwayStartingPitcher.description: Away team starting pitcher. Note: this is a probable pitcher until confirmed field = TRUE.

AwayBattingLineup.description: Away team batting lineup for the game

HomeTeamOpener.description: Indicates whether the home team will use an Opener as the starting pitcher. NOTE: An opener is a pitcher (typically a relief pitcher) that is only scheduled to pitch the first 1-3 innings of the game.

AwayTeamOpener.description: Indicates whether the away team will use an Opener as the starting pitcher. NOTE: An opener is a pitcher (typically a relief pitcher) that is only scheduled to pitch the first 1-3 innings of the game.
